testcase.system-out:
20:12:37.855 [main] INFO com.smartcrm.ai.service.LeadScoringService -- Scoring lead: lead-full 20:12:37.855 [main] ERROR com.smartcrm.ai.service.LeadScoringService -- Lead scoring error for lead-full: Strict stubbing argument mismatch. Please check: - this invocation of 'completeJson' method: llmClient.completeJson( "Analyze this B2B lead and provide a comprehensive scoring assessment.
LEAD INFORMATION: - Lead ID: lead-full - Contact Name: Sarah VP - Contact Title: VP of Sales - Company Name: Full Data Corp - Industry: FinTech - Company Size: Mid-Market - Revenue: Unknown - Source: Website
BEHAVIORAL DATA: - Emails Opened: 10 - Pages Viewed: 25 - Events Attended: 2 - Webinars Attended: 1 - Downloads: 5
FIRMOGRAPHIC DATA: - Employee Count: 500 - Annual Revenue: 10000000 - Market Segment: Mid-Market - Tech Stack: AWS, React, Node.js Provide your analysis in JSON format: { "score": <0-100 integer>, "reasoning": "<2-3 sentence explanation>", "key_factors": ["<factor 1>", "<factor 2>", "<factor 3>"], "recommendations": ["<recommendation 1>", "<recommendation 2>"] }
Focus on: title seniority, company fit, engagement level, and buying signals. ", null ); -> at com.smartcrm.ai.service.LeadScoringService.scoreLead(LeadScoringService.java:36) - has following stubbing(s) with different arguments: 1. llmClient.completeJson("", ""); -> at com.smartcrm.ai.service.LeadScoringServiceTest.scoreLead_withAllData_providesCompleteResponse(LeadScoringServiceTest.java:169) Typically, stubbing argument mismatch indicates user mistake when writing tests. Mockito fails early so that you can debug potential problem easily. However, there are legit scenarios when this exception generates false negative signal: - stubbing the same method multiple times using 'given().will()' or 'when().then()' API Please use 'will().given()' or 'doReturn().when()' API for stubbing. - stubbed method is intentionally invoked with different arguments by code under test Please use default or 'silent' JUnit Rule (equivalent of Strictness.LENIENT). For more information see javadoc for PotentialStubbingProblem class. 20:12:37.855 [main] WARN com.smartcrm.ai.service.LeadScoringService -- Using rule-based fallback scoring for lead: lead-full
